calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-28-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Phil Norgaard, Esq. appeared for plaintiff AGI Publishing, Inc. a California Corporation, dba Valley Yellow Pages.
Alice Hayes, Administrator for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Abdel Belayadi.
Default entered against defendant on June 26, 2008

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of e Plaintiff AGI Publishing, Inc. a California Corporation, dba Valley Yellow Pages, and against the Defaulted Defendant Abdel Belayadi as follows:

Damages/Principal - $34,835.02.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,140.80.
Attorney's Fees - $3,825.00.
Costs - $369.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $44,170.32.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than September 4, 2008.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2008 Continued To Sep-26-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2008 Off Calendar
